message:
🐛 Fix viewer count always 0 and demo mode not persisting across refresh (#355)

* 🌱 Add presence WebSocket connection and 10s polling for viewer count

- Frontend now establishes a WebSocket presence connection to the
  backend hub so the active users/connections count is non-zero
- Poll interval reduced from 30s to 10s for more responsive updates
- Mode-aware: demo=connections, OAuth=unique users

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix viewer count always 0 and demo mode not persisting across refresh

- Make /api/active-users public (no JWT required) — only returns aggregate counts
- Accept demo-token in WebSocket handler for presence tracking
- Use raw fetch instead of api client (bypasses backend-unavailable cache)
- Fix presenceStarted flag set before token check (blocked future connections)
- Add onmessage handler to refetch count after WebSocket authenticates
- Guard setGlobalDemoMode(false) by reading localStorage directly
- Add cross-tab demo mode sync via storage event
- Refetch viewer count on page navigation and demo mode toggle

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
